scenarios.description: child(1) returns second Element using cached shadowChildrenRef on subsequent call (cache-hit branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children and shadowChildrenRef empty
scenarios.expectedResult: first call populates cache, second call returns same second element without rebuilding

scenarios.description: child(0) rebuilds shadowChildrenRef after tree mutation (cache-invalidate branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one Element child and cached shadowChildrenRef
scenarios.expectedResult: after adding a new Element, cache is invalidated and child(0) still returns original first element
pseudocode: TEST TC08 child cache-invalidate on mutation
